## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Frontend lint passes with `npm run lint`
- [ ] Frontend typecheck passes with `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Frontend tests pass with `npm run test`
- [ ] Frontend production build passes with `npm run build:production`
- [ ] Backend lint passes with `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] Backend tests pass with `pytest`
- [ ] UI changes are responsive and accessible
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or setup changes

## Screenshots or notes

Add screenshots for visual changes or notes for backend-only changes.
